description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a rectangular layout, surrounded by a manicured lawn and a perimeter hedge. The front features a driveway leading to a carport and a detached garage, with a central walkway flanked by landscaped greenery. The house is composed of multiple interconnected volumes, with large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light and views of the garden. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a pool and outdoor seating area, while the sides are bordered by trees and shrubs for privacy. The exterior materials include a mix of white and beige stucco, dark metal or wood paneling, and glass, giving the house a sleek, contemporary appearance. The property is enclosed by a low hedge, and the overall design emphasizes open-plan living and strong indoor-outdoor connections.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard, featuring a driveway, carport, and private backyard with a pool. The exterior combines white and beige stucco with dark paneling and glass for a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, detached garage, central walkway, and main entrance flanked by large windows and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white and beige stucco walls, flat roof, and a row of trees along the property edge, with minimal window openings visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private backyard, pool, outdoor seating area, and extensive use of glass for the rear facade, with the hedge enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the dark paneling, additional landscaping, and the row of trees and garage structure, with more windows visible on this side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a wide walkway, minimal steps, large glass doors, and landscaped flanking greenery, no porch or columns
